description: MobiAct v2 XGBoost baseline (144-D orientation-invariant features, WINDOW_SIZE=128 @ 50 Hz). Models trained with magnitude-first gravity-separated feature design. ADL: 5 classes (JOG, LYI, SIT, STD, WAL). Fall detection: 4 fall types (BSC, FKL, FOL, SDL) vs 5 ADL.
enhanced_pipeline: flask_backend/app/motion_enhanced_features.py extract_enhanced_features — parity with v2 training extract_window_features
fall_type_pipeline: optional: scripts/baseline_falltype — omit fall_type in manifest to disable
